title: Flux-ratio anomalies in cusp quasars reveal dark matter beyond CDM
summary: Strongly lensed quasars in cusp configurations provide a uniquely sensitive probe of small-scale dark matter structure. Using the largest microlensing-free flux ratios for 17 quadruply imaged cusps, we combine these with extensive Monte Carlo simulations of mock lens realizations under cold dark matter (CDM), self-interacting dark matter (SIDM), and fuzzy dark matter (FDM) scenarios. Building on this, we propose a region (minor-axis and narrow major-axis cusp lenses) where flux-ratio anomalies persist even under globally parameterized models ("macromodels") with multipole freedom (capturing disk, asymmetric, or merger-driven structures). Within this region, J1042+1641 is $>3σ$ incompatible with both CDM and SIDM. Our results yield a Bayes factor exceeding $100$, providing very strong evidence for FDM over even the most optimistic CDM and SIDM scenarios. As only 11 cusp lenses lie within this region, extending to larger samples will be essential for assessing its statistical generality and for decisively confirming these findings with future microlensing-free flux ratio data.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强透镜化的尖点结构类星体为探测小尺度暗物质结构提供了独特的灵敏探针。利用17个四重成像尖点透镜中最大的无微引力透镜效应流量比，我们结合冷暗物质（CDM）、自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）和模糊暗物质（FDM）情景下模拟透镜实现的广泛蒙特卡洛模拟。在此基础上，我们提出了一个区域（短轴和窄长轴尖点透镜），在该区域内，即使采用具有多极自由度（捕获盘状、非对称或并合驱动结构）的全局参数化模型（“宏观模型”），流量比异常仍然存在。在该区域内，J1042+1641与CDM和SIDM均存在$>3σ$的不兼容性。我们的结果得到的贝叶斯因子超过$100$，为FDM相对于甚至最乐观的CDM和SIDM情景提供了非常强的证据。由于只有11个尖点透镜位于该区域内，扩展至更大样本对于评估其统计普遍性以及利用未来的无微引力透镜效应流量比数据最终确认这些发现至关重要。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结，FDM在解释尖点透镜流量比异常方面优于CDM和SIDM，但当前只有11个尖点透镜位于关键区域，需要更大样本进行统计验证和最终确认。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Top panels: Effective convergence perturbations ( \(\kappa_{{eff,sub}}\) ; see Eq. ( 14 )) induced by substructure in a representative lens with significant \(m=3/4\) multipoles, characterized by a major-axis angle \(\phi=70.63^{\circ}\) (see Extended Data Table. 3 for macromodel parameters). The black ellipse denotes the critical curve, and the insets show the distinct perturbation patterns associated with different dark matter scenarios at each cusp image position (A, B and C). The colours encode the angular misfit \(\chi^{2}\) (see Eq. ( 15 )), constructed from \(\phi\) and \(\phi_{1}\) . Middle panels: Source-plane caustics, with background colour indicating \(\log|\mu|\) . Insets illustrate the corresponding source positions for the points in the top panels, with colours also encoding \(\chi^{2}\) . They highlight substructure-induced distortions and local variations in the caustic shape across different dark matter scenarios. Bottom panels: Scatter distributions of \(R_{{cusp}}\) obtained while traversing \(\phi\) near the cusp angle. As the source approaches the narrow cusp, the differences among CDM, SIDM, and FDM increase substantially. In particular, interference-driven density fluctuations in FDM produce a larger fraction of high- \(R_{{cusp}}\) points.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：顶部面板：具有显著 \(m=3/4\) 多极的代表性透镜中，由次结构引起的有效会聚扰动（ \(\kappa_{{eff,sub}}\) ；见公式（14）），其特征为主轴角 \(\phi=70.63^{\circ}\) （宏观模型参数见扩展数据表3）。黑色椭圆表示临界曲线，插图显示了每个尖点像位置（A、B和C）处不同暗物质情景相关的不同扰动模式。颜色编码由 \(\phi\) 和 \(\phi_{1}\) 构建的角度失配 \(\chi^{2}\) （见公式（15））。中间面板：源平面焦散线，背景颜色表示 \(\log|\mu|\) 。插图显示了顶部面板中各点对应的源位置，颜色也编码 \(\chi^{2}\) 。它们突出了不同暗物质情景下次结构引起的畸变和焦散线形状的局部变化。底部面板：在尖点角附近遍历 \(\phi\) 时获得的 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 散点分布。当源接近窄尖点时，CDM、SIDM和FDM之间的差异显著增大。特别是，FDM中干涉驱动的密度涨落产生了更大比例的高 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 点。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Normalized \(R_{{cusp}}\) distributions predicted under different dark matter scenarios for cusp-configured mock lens systems generated using a SIE model with external shear (see Extended Data Fig. 4 for smooth-lens predictions). The lens populations are separated into major-axis and minor-axis cusp configurations (see Extended Data Fig. 3 ). The distributions are constructed by samples \(\phi\) from \(30^{\circ}\) to \(150^{\circ}\) and applying a normalized KDE within each \(\phi\) bin. The \(n\sigma\) contours correspond to highest-probability-density regions enclosing 68.3%, 95%, and 99.7% of the total KDE probability mass, respectively. The left, middle, and right columns correspond to mock lenses populated with CDM, SIDM, and FDM substructures, respectively. Each dark matter system contains \(\sim 10^{7}\) data points. The background colour map represents the KDE-normalized density computed from these data points in each \(\phi\) bin. Systems marked with red labels denote \(2\sigma\) outliers (see Extended Data Table. 8 for the per-system density values).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：对于使用带有外部剪切的SIE模型生成的尖点配置模拟透镜系统（平滑透镜预测见扩展数据图4），不同暗物质情景下预测的归一化 \(R_{{cusp}}\) 分布。透镜群体被分为长轴和短轴尖点配置（见扩展数据图3）。这些分布由从 \(30^{\circ}\) 到 \(150^{\circ}\) 的样本 \(\phi\) 构建，并在每个 \(\phi\) 区间内应用归一化KDE。 \(n\sigma\) 等高线分别对应包含总KDE概率质量68.3%、95%和99.7%的最高概率密度区域。左、中、右列分别对应填充了CDM、SIDM和FDM次结构的模拟透镜。每个暗物质系统包含 \(\sim 10^{7}\) 个数据点。背景色图表示根据每个 \(\phi\) 区间内这些数据点计算的KDE归一化密度。标有红色标签的系统表示 \(2\sigma\) 异常值（每个系统的密度值见扩展数据表8）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Same as Fig. 2 , but for mock lens systems generated with the SIE with external and multipole.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：与图2相同，但针对使用带有外部剪切和多极的SIE模型生成的模拟透镜系统。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Bayesian model comparison among dark matter scenarios and lens-structure prescriptions, quantified by the Bayes factor ratio \({BF}{\text{(row)}}/{BF}{\text{(column)}}\) . The scenarios include CDM, SIDM, and FDM, with and without higher-order multipole perturbations (MP). Values larger than unity indicate that the model listed in the row is favored over that in the column. The strength of this preference is interpreted using the Jeffreys scale applied to the Bayes-factor ratio, with values \(\gtrsim 100\) corresponding to decisive evidence, \(\sim 10\) – \(100\) to very strong evidence, and \(\sim 3\) – \(10\) to moderate evidence. We note that smooth lens models without substructure are overwhelmingly disfavored ( \({BF}{(smooth)}/{BF}{(sub)}\lesssim 10^{-35}\) ) (see Extended Data Table. 4 for details), where \({BF}{(sub)}\) denotes models including dark-matter substructure.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：暗物质情景与透镜结构规定之间的贝叶斯模型比较，由贝叶斯因子比 \({BF}{\text{(row)}}/{BF}{\text{(column)}}\) 量化。情景包括CDM、SIDM和FDM，有或没有高阶多极扰动（MP）。大于1的值表示行中列出的模型优于列中的模型。这种偏好的强度使用应用于贝叶斯因子比的杰弗里斯尺度解释，其中值 \(\gtrsim 100\) 对应决定性证据， \(\sim 10\) – \(100\) 对应非常强的证据， \(\sim 3\) – \(10\) 对应中等证据。我们注意到，没有次结构的平滑透镜模型被压倒性地否定（ \({BF}{(smooth)}/{BF}{(sub)}\lesssim 10^{-35}\) ）（详情见扩展数据表4），其中 \({BF}{(sub)}\) 表示包含暗物质次结构的模型。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 1: Workflow used in this study. (a) Observational data provide the image positions, flux ratios, and the geometric opening angle \(\phi\) . (b) From these quantities, we compute the observed \(R_{cusp}\) , which defines the constraints used to evaluate different dark matter scenarios. (c) We construct mock macrolens models. (d) We then add small-scale structure corresponding to CDM, SIDM, and FDM scenarios onto the smooth lens potentials. (e) Using our JAX -accelerated GPU implementation of the multi-plane lensing framework, we generate the lensing realizations. (f) A two-stage MCMC procedure samples source-plane configurations consistent with the target geometry, yielding weighted realizations of \(R_{cusp}\) . (g) For each dark matter scenario, we accumulate more than \(10^{7}\) realizations to construct statistical predictions in the \((R_{cusp},\phi)\) plane. (h) Comparison with the observational measurements through Bayesian marginalisation then yields the relative support for competing dark matter microphysics.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图1：本研究中使用的工作流程。(a) 观测数据提供像位置、流量比和几何张角 \(\phi\) 。(b) 根据这些量，我们计算观测到的 \(R_{cusp}\) ，它定义了用于评估不同暗物质情景的约束条件。(c) 我们构建模拟宏观透镜模型。(d) 然后，我们在平滑透镜势上添加对应于CDM、SIDM和FDM情景的小尺度结构。(e) 使用我们基于JAX加速的GPU实现的多平面透镜框架，我们生成透镜实现。(f) 一个两阶段MCMC过程对与目标几何一致的源平面配置进行采样，产生加权的 \(R_{cusp}\) 实现。(g) 对于每个暗物质情景，我们累积超过 \(10^{7}\) 个实现，以在 \((R_{cusp},\phi)\) 平面中构建统计预测。(h) 通过贝叶斯边缘化与观测测量进行比较，然后得出对竞争暗物质微观物理的相对支持。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Fig. 2: Background-subtracted gravitational lensing images of the selected cusp lenses. The JWST systems are taken from the GO-2046 program [ Nierenberg:2023tvi , Keeley:2024brx , Keeley:2025oig , Gilman:2025fhy ] , while the HST images use archival near-infrared data (see Extended Data Table. 1 for details). In both cases, the wavebands adopted for the photometric measurements probe emission regions that are effectively microlensing-free, although the images shown here are for illustration only. Lenses are grouped into major-axis (upper two rows) and minor-axis (lower two rows) cusps, ordered by increasing opening angle \(\phi\) . Systems such as B2045 and J1042 exhibit pronounced flux-ratio anomalies and are of particular interest in this work.
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据图2：所选尖点透镜的背景扣除引力透镜图像。JWST系统取自GO-2046项目[Nierenberg:2023tvi, Keeley:2024brx, Keeley:2025oig, Gilman:2025fhy]，而HST图像使用档案近红外数据（详情见扩展数据表1）。在这两种情况下，用于光度测量的波段探测的是有效无微引力透镜效应的发射区域，尽管此处显示的图像仅供说明。透镜按张角 \(\phi\) 递增顺序分为长轴（上两行）和短轴（下两行）尖点。像B2045和J1042这样的系统表现出明显的流量比异常，是本研究特别关注的。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Table 1: Observed properties of the cusp-configuration quasar lenses used in this study. The table lists the system name, the image opening angle \(\phi\) , \(R_{cusp}\) , the photometric band in which \(R_{cusp}\) is measured, and notes on whether the lens galaxy shows obvious visible structure. A dash (-) indicates that no clear evidence for a merger is reported. For B2045, earlier claims of a merger have been revised [ McKean:2006yt ] , as the object previously identified as a companion galaxy is now shown to be a foreground star [ Hsueh:2019ynk ] .
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据表1：本研究中使用的尖点配置类星体透镜的观测性质。表格列出了系统名称、像张角 \(\phi\) 、 \(R_{cusp}\) 、测量 \(R_{cusp}\) 的光度波段，以及关于透镜星系是否显示明显可见结构的注释。破折号(-)表示未报告并合的明确证据。对于B2045，早期的并合说法已被修订[McKean:2006yt]，因为先前被识别为伴星系的天体现被证明是一颗前景星[Hsueh:2019ynk]。

figures.caption_en: Extended Data Table 2: Redshifts and macromodel parameters of the cusp-configuration lens sample. An asterisk (*) indicates systems for which no reliable redshift measurement is currently available. In these cases, a fiducial redshift \(z_{l}=0.5\) is adopted solely for the purpose of estimating the macromodel parameters of the main lens, including the Einstein radius \(\theta_{E}\) , the axis ratio \(q\) , and the external shear \(\gamma\) .
figures.caption_zh: 扩展数据表2：尖点配置透镜样本的红移和宏观模型参数。星号(*)表示目前尚无可靠红移测量的系统。在这些情况下，仅出于估计主透镜宏观模型参数（包括爱因斯坦半径 \(\theta_{E}\) 、轴比 \(q\) 和外部剪切 \(\gamma\) ）的目的，采用基准红移 \(z_{l}=0.5\) 。

title: A shot in the dark: searching for dark substructures in the RX J0437+00 galaxy cluster
summary: Obtaining a census of dark matter structures at low mass ($\leq 10^9 M_\odot$) can provide strong constraints on the nature of dark matter, though identifying such structures remains difficult. In this work, we study the galaxy cluster RX J0437.1+0043, taking advantage of its powerful "exotic" Hyperbolic-Umbilic (HU) lensing configuration to search for substructure candidates. Using a combination of high resolution imaging, IFU spectroscopy, and gravitational lensing modelling, we report on a tentative detection of a dark matter subhalo ($m_{\rm halo} = 2.25 \pm 0.94 \times 10^9 M_\odot$) near the vicinity of one of the largest HU images. We stress that this result is still preliminary and that deeper data and more advanced modelling techniques are needed to ultimately confirm this detection. Nevertheless, this work outlines the first steps towards understanding subhalo properties in dense cluster environments, developing HU cluster lenses as a potential new tool for investigating dark matter.

AI.tldr: 利用RX J0437.1+0043星系团的特殊双曲脐点透镜配置，首次探测到约22.5亿太阳质量的暗物质子晕候选体，为研究低质量暗物质结构提供了新方法。
AI.motivation: 探测低质量（≤10^9太阳质量）暗物质结构对理解暗物质本质至关重要，但传统方法难以识别此类结构。本研究旨在利用特殊引力透镜配置来寻找暗物质子晕。
AI.method: 结合高分辨率成像、积分视场单元光谱和引力透镜建模，分析RX J0437.1+0043星系团的双曲脐点透镜配置，在最大HU图像附近搜索暗物质子晕候选体。
AI.result: 初步探测到一个暗物质子晕候选体，质量约为(2.25±0.94)×10^9太阳质量。该结果仍需更深入数据和先进建模技术来最终确认。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作首次展示了利用双曲脐点星系团透镜作为研究暗物质新工具的潜力，为理解致密星系团环境中子晕性质迈出了重要一步。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为星系团暗物质子晕探测，虽涉及引力透镜和暗物质，但属于星系团尺度而非用户核心的星系-星系强透镜领域，且不涉及高红移星系动力学、运动学、偏振或多相气体等优先方向。无核心作者匹配，方法为透镜建模但非用户常用技术。

recommendation.method_fit: 中等。使用引力透镜建模，但针对星系团而非单个星系，与用户常用方法不完全一致。
recommendation.author_fit: 低。无用户核心作者参与。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 中等。利用特殊透镜配置探测暗物质子晕有一定新意，但结果初步且非用户核心方向。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文聚焦星系团暗物质子晕，偏离用户核心的星系-星系强透镜及高红移星系研究。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 获取低质量（≤10^9 M_⊙）暗物质结构的普查可以为暗物质的性质提供强有力的约束，尽管识别此类结构仍然困难。在这项工作中，我们研究了星系团RX J0437.1+0043，利用其强大的“奇异”双曲脐点（HU）透镜构型来搜索子结构候选体。结合高分辨率成像、IFU光谱和引力透镜建模，我们报告在一个最大的HU图像附近，初步探测到一个暗物质子晕（m_halo = 2.25 ± 0.94 × 10^9 M_⊙）。我们强调这一结果仍是初步的，需要更深入的数据和更先进的建模技术来最终确认这一探测。尽管如此，这项工作勾勒出理解致密星系团环境中子晕性质的第一步，将HU星系团透镜发展为研究暗物质的潜在新工具。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，这项工作首次展示了利用双曲脐点星系团透镜作为研究暗物质新工具的潜力，为理解致密星系团环境中子晕性质迈出了重要一步。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Examples of rare, “exotic” lens configurations. The left column displays the critical curves in the (observed) image plane, with the characteristic image formations and image parity shown by the multicoloured regions. The right column shows the corresponding caustics in the (demagnified, intrinsic) source plane. [Adapted from Figs. 1-3 in Meena and Bagla ( 2020 ) .] Lenses in exotic configurations are more sensitive to the effects of nearby substructures than more common “stable” lensed images, making them ideal probes to look for low-mass subhalos. The Hyperbolic-Umbilic (HU) lensing configuration seen in the middle panels are the subject of this work.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：罕见的“奇异”透镜构型示例。左列显示（观测）像平面中的临界曲线，多色区域表示特征像形成和像奇偶性。右列显示（消放大、本征）源平面中相应的焦散线。[改编自Meena和Bagla (2020)的图1-3。] 奇异构型中的透镜比更常见的“稳定”透镜像对附近子结构的影响更敏感，使其成为寻找低质量子晕的理想探针。中间面板中显示的双曲脐点（HU）透镜构型是本文的研究对象。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Spectroscopically-confirmed multiply-imaged sources in the RX J0437 field, overlaid on multi-band HST imaging (F140W/F110W/F814W). Sources identified as Hyperbolic-Umbilic (HU) systems appear in cyan, while all other systems are shown in red. Numbering convention of all systems follows that presented in Lagattuta et al. ( 2023 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：RX J0437场中经光谱证认的多重成像源，叠加在多波段HST成像（F140W/F110W/F814W）上。被识别为双曲脐点（HU）系统的源以青色显示，而所有其他系统以红色显示。所有系统的编号约定遵循Lagattuta等人 (2023) 中的介绍。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Multiple images of HU System 1 ( \(z=2.97\) ), seen in several data sets. In the top left panel, we see a greyscale image of the complete system, observed in HST /F814W imaging, the highest resolution image available. A zoom-in of one image (Image 1.2) is seen in the bottom left cutout. From this data we have identified seven distinct morphological features (“clumps”, labelled 1-7), which we identify with coloured apertures. A 3-band colour image of the same system is shown in the bottom middle panel. This adds colour information, but individual clumps appear less distinct, due to the lower resolution of the HST /F110W and F140W imaging. The top right panel shows how the system appears in VLT/MUSE imaging, in this case, a complete ring structure composed of Lyman- \(\alpha\) emission. A zoom in (of the same individual image) is shown in the bottom right panel. Contrasting with the HST imaging, the MUSE view of the system shows a broad, smooth feature, rather than distinct clumps.

title: ReveaLLAGN 1: JWST Emission-Line Spectra Reveal Low-Luminosity AGN with UV-Deficient SEDs and Warm Molecular Gas
comment: Submitted to The Astrophysical Journal; under review after addressing referee comments. 25 pages, 10 figures
summary: We present near- and mid-infrared spectra of eight Low-Luminosity Active Galactic Nuclei (LLAGN), spanning nearly four orders of magnitude in black hole mass and Eddington ratio, obtained with JWST/NIRSpec and MIRI as part of the ReveaLLAGN program along with identical archival data of Cen A. The high spatial resolution of JWST cleanly separates AGN emission from host-galaxy contamination, enabling detections of high-ionization potential lines more than an order of magnitude fainter than previously measured. Emission-line diagnostics reveal a transition at log($L_{bol}/L_{Edd}$) ~ -3.5, where the spectral energy distribution becomes increasingly deficient in ultraviolet photons. We find that rotational H$_2$ excitation temperatures are elevated (~500 K higher) compared to both higher-luminosity AGN and star-forming galaxies, while the H$_2$(0-0)S(3)/PAH$_{11.3 μm}$ ratios are consistent with those observed in the AGN population. We discuss the possible roles of outflows, jets, and X-ray dominated regions in shaping the interstellar medium surrounding LLAGN. Silicate emission at ~10 $μ$m, localized to the nuclear region, is detected in most ReveaLLAGN targets. This dataset offers the first comprehensive JWST-based characterization of infrared emission lines in the nuclear regions of LLAGN.

AI.tldr: JWST观测揭示低光度活动星系核(LLAGN)的独特红外光谱特征，发现爱丁顿比约-3.5处的能谱分布转变，以及比高光度AGN和恒星形成星系更高的H₂激发温度。
AI.motivation: 研究低光度活动星系核(LLAGN)的红外光谱特征，利用JWST的高空间分辨率分离AGN和宿主星系贡献，探索这些低光度系统的物理特性及其与高光度AGN的差异。
AI.method: 使用JWST的NIRSpec和MIRI仪器观测8个LLAGN，覆盖黑洞质量和爱丁顿比四个数量级范围，结合Cen A的档案数据。利用JWST的高空间分辨率清洁分离AGN发射和宿主星系污染。
AI.result: 1) 在log(L_bol/L_Edd) ~ -3.5处发现能谱分布转变，紫外光子逐渐缺乏；2) H₂旋转激发温度比高光度AGN和恒星形成星系高约500K；3) H₂(0-0)S(3)/PAH_{11.3μm}比值与AGN群体一致；4) 多数目标在核区检测到~10μm硅酸盐发射。
AI.conclusion: 这是首次基于JWST对LLAGN核区红外发射线的全面表征，揭示了低光度AGN的独特物理特性，为理解外流、喷流和X射线主导区域在塑造LLAGN周围星际介质中的作用提供了新见解。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了通过JWST/NIRSpec和MIRI获得的八个低光度活动星系核（LLAGN）的近红外和中红外光谱，这些光谱是ReveaLLAGN项目的一部分，以及Cen A的相同存档数据，其黑洞质量和爱丁顿比率跨越近四个数量级。JWST的高空间分辨率清晰地将AGN发射与宿主星系污染分开，使得能够探测到比先前测量结果暗一个数量级以上的高电离势线。发射线诊断揭示了在log($L_{bol}/L_{Edd}$) ~ -3.5处的一个转变，在该处光谱能量分布变得日益缺乏紫外光子。我们发现，与更高光度AGN和恒星形成星系相比，旋转H$_2$激发温度升高（约高500 K），而H$_2$(0-0)S(3)/PAH$_{11.3 μm}$比率与在AGN群体中观测到的比率一致。我们讨论了外流、喷流和X射线主导区域在塑造LLAGN周围星际介质中可能扮演的角色。在大多数ReveaLLAGN目标中，探测到了局限于核区的~10 $μ$m硅酸盐发射。该数据集提供了首个基于JWST的LLAGN核区红外发射线的全面表征。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 这是首次基于JWST对LLAGN核区红外发射线的全面表征，揭示了低光度AGN的独特物理特性，为理解外流、喷流和X射线主导区域在塑造LLAGN周围星际介质中的作用提供了新见解。（基于可用摘要）

title: Unifying cluster and galaxy cosmology analyses using the galaxy-halo connection
summary: Galaxies and galaxy clusters trace the same cosmic density field, but their statistics have been modeled separately in cosmological analyses. We present a unified, simulation-based framework to model them using the galaxy-halo connection. Our analysis includes cluster lensing, galaxy clustering, and galaxy-cluster cross-correlation. We validate our method on the FLAMINGO hydrodynamic simulation. Relative to the cluster-only approach, combining these probes improves the $σ_8-Ω_m$ figure of merit by a factor of 15. Our framework enables stringent tests of cosmological models and exploits small-scale information.

AI.tldr: 该研究提出了一个统一的模拟框架，将星系和星系团统计建模结合起来，通过星系-晕连接方法，结合了星系团引力透镜、星系聚类和星系-星系团互相关三种观测手段，显著提升了宇宙学参数约束能力。
AI.motivation: 星系和星系团都追踪相同的宇宙密度场，但传统上在宇宙学分析中它们的统计特性被分开建模。这种分离限制了宇宙学参数的约束能力，特别是无法充分利用小尺度信息。
AI.method: 开发了一个基于模拟的统一框架，通过星系-晕连接方法建模星系和星系团。该方法整合了三种观测探针：星系团引力透镜、星系聚类和星系-星系团互相关。在FLAMINGO流体动力学模拟上进行了验证。
AI.result: 相比仅使用星系团数据的传统方法，结合三种观测探针将σ₈-Ω_m参数组合的figure of merit（约束能力指标）提高了15倍。该框架能够对宇宙学模型进行更严格的检验，并充分利用小尺度信息。
AI.conclusion: 该统一框架显著提升了宇宙学参数的约束能力，为未来宇宙学分析提供了更强大的工具，能够更有效地利用星系和星系团的协同观测信息。

recommendation.reason: 该论文主要关注宇宙学参数约束（σ₈-Ωₘ），属于星系-晕连接和星系团宇宙学领域，与用户主要兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等）重叠有限。虽然涉及引力透镜（星系团透镜），但并非用户核心关注的星系-星系强透镜或高红移星系内部性质。无核心作者匹配。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系和星系团追踪相同的宇宙密度场，但在宇宙学分析中，它们的统计量一直分别建模。我们提出了一个统一的、基于模拟的框架，利用星系-晕关联对它们进行建模。我们的分析包括星系团透镜效应、星系成团性以及星系-星系团互相关。我们在FLAMINGO流体动力学模拟上验证了该方法。与仅使用星系团的方法相比，结合这些探针将$σ_8-Ω_m$品质因数提高了15倍。我们的框架能够对宇宙学模型进行严格的检验，并利用小尺度信息。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Validation of our unified framework. The points with error bars correspond to the mock observations from flamingo , and the four panels correspond to cluster lensing (CL), galaxy density and clustering (GG), cluster-galaxy cross-correlation (C \(\times\) G), and galaxy-galaxy lensing (GGL). We fit our models to the first three (excluding GGL due to uncertainties in baryonic physics), and the bands correspond to the posterior predictions. Our model describes all these data vectors well and leads to unbiased, competitive cosmological constraints (see Fig. 2 ).

The non-unified approach improves upon the cluster-only case (CL) by a factor of 2.6, while the unified approach improves the FoM by a factor of 9. Including cluster-galaxy cross-correlation (C \(\times\) G) further improves the FoM by a factor of 1.7. Adding galaxy-galaxy lensing (GGL) improves the FoM by an additional factor of 1.8.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：各种数据向量组合的预测约束能力。品质因数定义为\({FoM}=10^{-3}[\det{Cov}(\sigma_{8},\Omega_{m})]^{-1/2}\)。非统一方法相比仅星系团情况（CL）提高了2.6倍，而统一方法将FoM提高了9倍。包含星系-星系团互相关（C \(\times\) G）进一步将FoM提高了1.7倍。添加星系-星系透镜效应（GGL）将FoM额外提高了1.8倍。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Forecasted constraints derived from fitting the unified model to simulated data vector combinations. With the unified framework, adding galaxy clustering (GG) significantly improves the constraints from cluster lensing alone (CL). Adding cluster-galaxy cross correlation (C \(\times\) G) further tightens the constraints (also see Table 2 ). We assume a survey volume matching the flamingo simulation, 1 Gpc 3 .

title: Magnetic threads and gravity: ALMA Observations of IRDC G14.225-0.506
summary: During the star formation process, the interplay between gravity, turbulence, and B-fields is significant, with B-fields apparently serving a regulatory function. However, the extent to which B-fields are decisive relative to turbulence and gravity remains uncertain. This study aims to ascertain the role of B-fields in the fragmentation of molecular clouds. We examine the B-field observed with ALMA at core scales towards the infrared dark cloud G14.225-0.506, focusing on 3 regions with shared physical conditions, and juxtapose it with prior observations at the Hub-filament system scale. Our findings indicate a similar B-field strength and fragmentation level between the 2 hubs. However, distinct B-field morphologies are identified across the 3 regions where polarized emission is detected. In the region N, the large-scale B-field, which is perpendicular to the filamentary structure, persists at smaller scales in the southern half but becomes distorted near the more massive condensations in the northern half. Notably, these condensations exhibit signs of impending collapse, as evidenced by supercritical mass-to-flux values. In the region S, the B-field is considerably inhomogeneous among the detected condensations, and we do not observe a direct correlation between the field morphology and the condensation density. Lastly, in an isolated dust clump located within a southern filament of the northern hub, the B-field aligns parallel to the elongated emission, suggesting a transition in the field geometry. The B-field shows a clear evolution with spatial scales. We propose that the most massive condensations detected in the northern Hub are undergoing gravitational collapse, as revealed by the relative significance of the magnetic field and gravitational potential and mass-to-flux ratio. The distortion of the B-field could be a response to the flow of material due to the collapse.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 在恒星形成过程中，引力、湍流和磁场之间的相互作用具有重要意义，其中磁场似乎起着调节作用。然而，磁场相对于湍流和引力在多大程度上起决定性作用仍不确定。本研究旨在确定磁场在分子云碎裂中的作用。我们利用ALMA在核尺度上对红外暗云G14.225-0.506的磁场进行了观测，重点关注三个具有共同物理条件的区域，并将其与之前在枢纽-纤维系统尺度上的观测结果进行对比。我们的研究结果表明，两个枢纽的磁场强度和碎裂程度相似。然而，在探测到偏振发射的三个区域中，识别出了不同的磁场形态。在N区域，大尺度磁场垂直于纤维结构，在南部半部分的小尺度上保持不变，但在北部半部分更致密的凝聚体附近发生扭曲。值得注意的是，这些凝聚体显示出即将塌缩的迹象，如超临界的质量-磁通比值所示。在S区域，探测到的凝聚体之间的磁场相当不均匀，我们未观察到磁场形态与凝聚体密度之间的直接相关性。最后，在北部枢纽南部纤维中的一个孤立尘埃团块中，磁场与拉长的发射平行排列，表明场几何结构发生了转变。磁场随空间尺度表现出明显的演化。我们认为，在北部枢纽中探测到的最致密凝聚体正在经历引力塌缩，这由磁场与引力势的相对重要性以及质量-磁通比值所揭示。磁场的扭曲可能是对塌缩引起的物质流动的响应。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：磁场随空间尺度发生明显演化。北部枢纽中最致密的凝聚体正在经历引力塌缩，这通过磁场与引力势的相对重要性以及质量-磁通比值得以揭示。磁场的扭曲可能是对塌缩引起的物质流动的响应。

title: A more inclusive effective dark fluid equation of state parameter: constraints from SKA and Euclid like surveys
comment: Proceedings of a poster presented during SKAO General Science Meeting, Görlitz
summary: We forecast constraints on an effective dark fluid equation of state parameter $w_{\rm eff}$ that encapsulates modified gravity theories that modifies both the Universe background expansion as well as its large scale structures growth. This is achieved through relating Friedmann equations' dark fluid pressure and density content, thus $w_{\rm eff}$, to modified gravity parameterized models by mean of the Newtonian potential equation parameter $μ_0$, the gravitational slip parameter $η_0$ and a redshift dependent Hubble parameter $H_{0,{\rm bck}}$. We adopt next stage SKA survey specifications, alone or in combination with concurrently expected DR3 Euclid survey release, paying attention to the modeling and recipe of the implementation of the galaxy clustering and lensing probes obtained from the two surveys. We consider two data mock models: one with deviation of the intermediate parameters at the level of 10 \% (yielding however $w_{\rm eff}=-1.03$) and another sub-percently close to $Λ$CDM. We found that the three parameters deviation from $Λ$CDM could only be detected at 1 $σ$ from SKA alone, while this improves to $\sim$ 2 $σ$ when we combine with Euclid. An improvement of the order of 30\% on the bounds is reached after projecting the three parameters into a single $w_{\rm eff}$ parameter. However, this affects both cases and thus it does not change much, though it improves the level of detection with respect to $Λ$CDM values. We conclude that synergy from both surveys benefits to tighten our constraints, but also that our highly generalized parameterization, although impacting at both the background and the perturbation level, will be hard to disentangle from $Λ$CDM at the level at which our forecast is performed and it still needs, to the least, data from more advanced stages of the adopted surveys to hope reach this target.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用SKA和Euclid巡天数据预测对有效暗流体状态参数weff的约束，该参数封装了修改引力理论对宇宙背景膨胀和大尺度结构增长的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在通过SKA和Euclid巡天数据约束修改引力理论，这些理论通过有效暗流体状态参数weff同时影响宇宙背景膨胀和大尺度结构增长，从而区分这些理论与标准ΛCDM模型。
AI.method: 通过弗里德曼方程将暗流体压力与密度关联到weff，再与修改引力参数化模型（牛顿势参数μ0、引力滑移参数η0、红移依赖哈勃参数H0,bck）关联。采用SKA巡天规格，单独或结合Euclid DR3数据，考虑两种数据模拟模型：一种参数偏离ΛCDM约10%，另一种亚百分比接近ΛCDM。

figures.caption_zh: 表2：Euclid-like DR3预期的光度角透镜和成团，以及光谱巡天3D功率谱规格，其中 \(A_{surv}\) 为巡天面积，\(V_{i}\) 为每个红移bin的巡天体积，\(\sigma_{\epsilon}\) 为固有椭圆率色散，\(\sigma_{0,z}\) 为光度红移测量误差。还显示了SKA AA*配置用于连续角透镜和成团巡天、HI和强度映射MI功率谱的规格，其中 \(D\) 为碟形天线直径，\(N\) 为其数量及观测小时数，\(r\) 为共动距离，\(\Omega\) 为覆盖两个红移之间区域的立体角。

Right plot: Same settings and parameters as the left plot but combining with a Euclid-like DR3 future observations.
